summary: Comprehensive testing of Audit Readiness v2 refactor (QUESTION_BANK config-driven, monthly_checks collection). All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend flows tested: non-enrolled teaser, enrolled dashboard with 6 domain cards, Run Check 6-step flow, Results screen with overall GREEN badge, History screen, Admin page with carrier row expansion and domain verify toggles.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: carrier rows in AdminAuditReadinessPage.jsx do not have data-testid attributes on the row-level button. Only verify-toggle-* and send-email-* buttons have testids. Consider adding data-testid='carrier-row-{userId}' for better testability.
ar_01 NOT_SURE correctly does NOT trigger critical override (only NO does), consistent with config criticalFailOn: ['NO']
seed_data_creation: Temporarily added product_purchases cohort record for coach_vince_001 to test enrolled dashboard. Record persists in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Audit Readiness v2 features working. New session token for vince: 9e4df2be51194ca29da8d30e292b5b63. Backend: GET /api/audit-readiness (shape ok, enrolled=true with cohort), POST /api/audit-readiness (all YES=>GREEN, ia_01 NOT_SURE=>criticalOverride=true/RED, ar_01 NO=>criticalOverride=true/RED, mixed NOT_SURE=>notSureVerifyLines populated), GET /api/audit-readiness/history (sorted desc), GET /api/audit-readiness/{check_id}, GET /api/admin/audit-readiness (array with latestCheckId/overallResult/domainResults), PUT /api/admin/audit-readiness/check/{check_id}/domain/driver_qualification (ok:true), invalid domain => 400. Frontend: teaser (non-enrolled), enrolled dashboard with 6 domain cards, start-checkin-btn opens Run Check screen, YES/NO/NOT_SURE radio buttons, checkin-next advances steps, checkin-submit submits and shows Results screen with 6 domain cards and return-to-dashboard-btn, view-history-btn shows history screen, admin /admin/audit-readiness loads with carrier row expandable showing 6 domain rows with verify toggles.

test_results.post_ia01_not_sure_critical_override: PASS - criticalOverride=true, overall RED, ia domain RED
test_results.post_mixed_not_sure_verify_lines: PASS - notSureVerifyLines populated for dq and da domains
test_results.portal_enrolled_dashboard: PASS - audit-readiness-dashboard with domain cards, start-checkin-btn, view-history-btn
test_results.run_check_flow: PASS - 6 domains, YES/NO/NOT_SURE buttons, checkin-next advances, checkin-submit submits
test_results.results_screen: PASS - 6 domain result cards, overall GREEN badge, return-to-dashboard-btn
test_results.history_screen: PASS - audit-history-screen with 8 checks on record
test_results.admin_page: PASS - admin-audit-readiness, carrier row expands with 6 domain verify toggles
